series_metadata.series_title: Investigation Records from Files Underlying Formal Board Actions
series_metadata.series_description: Confidential records exempt from public records law (such as medical records) from investigative files from cases resulting in a formal public disciplinary action of the Board, such as a reprimand, suspension, revocation, surrender, or other publicly available disciplinary action against a licensee or applicant.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Entire paper file scanned to digital file (such as pdf) on Board storage device and back-up; paper file destroyed after Board staff determines integrity of digital file; retain digital file until death of licensee, then destroy. ; Electronic: Digital file images of shredded paper records shall be retained in until death of licensee, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
